class.name: C3Http.CancellationToken
class.brief_description: Token passed to [member C3Http.Options.cancellation_token] to cancel an in-flight request from another coroutine or signal handler.

method.name: cancel
method.description: Cancels any in-flight request holding this token. Subsequent calls have no effect.

method.name: is_cancelled
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if [method C3Http.CancellationToken.cancel] has been called.
